articles.description: Follow live text updates and listen to BBC radio commentary from Augusta National as round one of the 90th Masters gets under way.
articles.title: The Masters 2026 LIVE: Round one - radio commentary, text updates & latest scores

articles.description: A jolly Tyson Fury delivers typically theatrical monologue as he takes aim at rival heavyweights and even a struggling Premier League club.
articles.title: Fury vs Makhmudov: Tyson Fury in high spirits as he takes aim at Oleksandr Usyk & Tottenham

articles.description: Martim Fernandes' freak own goal gifted Nottingham Forest a route to a first European semi-final in over 40 years.
articles.title: Porto 1-1 Nottingham Forest: Spectacular Martim Fernandes own goal gives Forest Europa League lifeline

articles.description: The Darts Regulation Authority bans transgender women from competing in its women's events with immediate effect.
articles.title: Darts: Transgender women banned from women's PDC events

articles.description: Ollie Watkins' response to being dropped by England has been nothing short of emphatic, with two strikes in Bologna adding to his goal against West Ham before the international break.
articles.title: Ollie Watkins: Aston Villa striker is man on mission but will England boss Thomas Tuchel take notice?

articles.description: New Zealander cyclist Kiaan Watts is banned for 25 days by cycling's global governing body after he punched a fellow rider in the head during a race last month.
articles.title: Kiaan Watts banned for 25 days by UCI after he punched fellow rider during race
Robertson to leave Liverpool at the end of the season

articles.description: Golf icon Tom Watson says LIV defectors like Brooks Koepka and Patrick Reed should not have been allowed back on the PGA Tour and banned for life.
articles.title: Masters 2026: Tom Watson criticises PGA Tour for allowing return of Koepka and Reed from LIV

articles.description: Michael Oliver and Anthony Taylor have been named as referees for this summer's 2026 World Cup.
articles.title: 2026 World Cup: Michael Oliver and Anthony Taylor named as referees

articles.description: Jonny Clayton comes back from 5-2 down to beat Michael van Gerwen 6-5 and claim his third nightly win to move top of the Premier League.
articles.title: Premier League Darts 2026 results: Jonny Clayton beats Michael van Gerwen to secure nightly win in Brighton
